india_trends.title: Simca Advertising IPO GMP signals 17% listing pop: Check subscription and other details on Day 3 of the offer
india_trends.summary: Simca Advertising IPO GMP today is ₹31 as against ₹30 on Monday and ₹14 a day before that, signalling growing investor interest in the counter. At the current GMP, Simca Advertising IPO listing price could be ₹214, suggesting a listing pop of 16.9%.

india_trends.title: Recode Studios share price hits 5% upper circuit after bumper debut
india_trends.summary: Recode Studios shares debuted strongly on BSE SME, opening at ₹213.10, 35% above the issue price. The stock reached an upper circuit limit of ₹223.75. The IPO raised ₹44.6 crore, with a subscription rate of 234.64 times.

india_trends.title: Zerodha's Nikhil Kamath backs gold-based stablecoin over dollar-linked crypto; says UPI saved India from a bigger risk
india_trends.summary: Kamath proposes a gold-backed stablecoin for India to unlock value from idle gold, criticizing the push for dollar-linked digital assets. He lauds India's cautious regulatory stance on cryptocurrencies, suggesting that blockchain could help monetize the vast gold reserves held by households.

india_trends.title: One MobiKwik Systems Q4 Results: Co swings to black with Rs 4 crore profit vs Rs 56 crore loss YoY
india_trends.summary: One MobiKwik Systems Q4 Results: One MobiKwik Systems achieved a net profit of Rs 4.38 crore in the fourth quarter of FY26. This marks a strong recovery from a net loss in the same period last year. Revenue from operations saw an 8% increase. The company's EBITDA also turned positive.

india_trends.title: Cisco Earnings Watch: Can AI momentum drive another rally?
india_trends.summary: Cisco Systems is set to report Q3 FY26 earnings on May 13, with investors closely watching AI infrastructure demand, hyperscaler spending, margins and guidance amid rising optimism around networking and cloud growth opportunities.
